title: Football jerseys
description:
This mod adds football jerseys. In the future I'll probably add shorts, too! This mod has a small texture issue on the hand. I dont know why. The texture is in the gallery:) (soon)

Made with MCreator
body:
It adds:
Real Madrid,Barcelona and Bayern München jerseys, offside flag with 3d model and a championsleaguetrophy with a 3d model.


(Do i need jersey rights?)


Future plans:
•more jerseys
•player names and numbers on back
•shorts

bug report and more [https://github.com/Sushiportion/Footballjerseya.mc.mod.bugreport/issues/1](https://github.com/Sushiportion/Footballjerseya.mc.mod.bugreport/issues/1)
